mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${decisionRunsTable} ( decision_id char(36) PRIMARY KEY, started_at datetime(6) NOT NULL, completed_at datetime(6), created_at datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), inst_id varchar(64) NOT NULL, inst_type varchar(32), base_ccy varchar(32), quote_ccy varchar(32), td_mode varchar(32), trigger_type varchar(64), trigger_reason text, trigger_details_json json, action varchar(16), decision_reason text, buy_quote_amount decimal(38,18), sell_base_amount decimal(38,18), last_price decimal(38,18), available_base decimal(38,18), available_quote decimal(38,18), execution_status varchar(64), skip_reason text, error text, KEY idx_decision_runs_started_at (started_at), KEY idx_decision_runs_inst_action (inst_id, action, started_at) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${aiRequestsTable} ( id bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, decision_id char(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), prompt_text text, ai_parameters_json json, CONSTRAINT fk_ai_requests_decision FOREIGN KEY (decision_id) REFERENCES ${decisionRunsTable} (decision_id) ON DELETE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${aiResponsesTable} ( id bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, decision_id char(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE, received_at datetime(6) NOT NULL, raw_response text, parsed_action varchar(16), parsed_reason text, parsed_buy_quote_amount decimal(38,18), parsed_sell_base_amount decimal(38,18), CONSTRAINT fk_ai_responses_decision FOREIGN KEY (decision_id) REFERENCES ${decisionRunsTable} (decision_id) ON DELETE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${orderExecutionsTable} ( id bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, decision_id char(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), inst_id varchar(64) NOT NULL, side varchar(16), td_mode varchar(32), order_type varchar(32), target_currency varchar(32), order_size decimal(38,18), order_id varchar(128), client_order_id varchar(128), execution_status varchar(64), skip_reason text, filled_base_amount decimal(38,18), average_fill_price decimal(38,18), fee decimal(38,18), fee_ccy varchar(32), error text, KEY idx_order_executions_order_id (order_id), CONSTRAINT fk_order_executions_decision FOREIGN KEY (decision_id) REFERENCES ${decisionRunsTable} (decision_id) ON DELETE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( decision_id, started_at, completed_at, inst_id, inst_type, base_ccy, quote_ccy, td_mode, trigger_type, trigger_reason, trigger_details_json, action, decision_reason, buy_quote_amount, sell_base_amount, last_price, available_base, available_quote, execution_status, skip_reason, error ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{instId}, #{instType}, #{baseCcy}, #{quoteCcy}, #{tdMode}, #{triggerType}, #{triggerReason}, #{triggerDetailsJson}, #{action}, #{decisionReason}, #{buyQuoteAmount}, #{sellBaseAmount}, #{lastPrice}, #{availableBase}, #{availableQuote}, #{executionStatus}, #{skipReason}, #{error} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE completed_at = VALUES(completed_at), action = VALUES(action), decision_reason = VALUES(decision_reason), buy_quote_amount = VALUES(buy_quote_amount), sell_base_amount = VALUES(sell_base_amount), last_price = VALUES(last_price), available_base = VALUES(available_base), available_quote = VALUES(available_quote), execution_status = VALUES(execution_status), skip_reason = VALUES(skip_reason), error = VALUES(error)

INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( decision_id, prompt_text, ai_parameters_json ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{promptText}, #{aiParametersJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE prompt_text = VALUES(prompt_text), ai_parameters_json = VALUES(ai_parameters_json)

INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( decision_id, received_at, raw_response, parsed_action, parsed_reason, parsed_buy_quote_amount, parsed_sell_base_amount ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{receivedAt}, #{rawResponse}, #{parsedAction}, #{parsedReason}, #{parsedBuyQuoteAmount}, #{parsedSellBaseAmount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE received_at = VALUES(received_at), raw_response = VALUES(raw_response), parsed_action = VALUES(parsed_action), parsed_reason = VALUES(parsed_reason), parsed_buy_quote_amount = VALUES(parsed_buy_quote_amount), parsed_sell_base_amount = VALUES(parsed_sell_base_amount)

INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( decision_id, inst_id, side, td_mode, order_type, target_currency, order_size, order_id, client_order_id, execution_status, skip_reason, filled_base_amount, average_fill_price, fee, fee_ccy, error ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{instId}, #{side}, #{tdMode}, #{orderType}, #{targetCurrency}, #{orderSize}, #{orderId}, #{clientOrderId}, #{executionStatus}, #{skipReason}, #{filledBaseAmount}, #{averageFillPrice}, #{fee}, #{feeCcy}, #{error} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE order_size = VALUES(order_size), order_id = VALUES(order_id), client_order_id = VALUES(client_order_id), execution_status = VALUES(execution_status), skip_reason = VALUES(skip_reason), filled_base_amount = VALUES(filled_base_amount), average_fill_price = VALUES(average_fill_price), fee = VALUES(fee), fee_ccy = VALUES(fee_ccy), error = VALUES(error)
